scenarios.reason: The Stage 1 system prompt instructs the model to output exactly the 7 required section headers verbatim in order, beginning with '# AI Product Requirements Document: [Product Name]'. The renderPRDWithGaps function parses and renders all sections. The gap detection and rendering logic is fully implemented. All 7 headers will be present in output for non-trivial input, with substantive content in at least 5 sections.

STAGE1_SYSTEM contains an explicit SKIP RULE targeting sections 2, 3, and 5, instructing the model to output '> _Not applicable. [One sentence reason derived from the input.]_' when input describes no AI/ML components. The rule is specific and instructs contextual reasoning rather than generic N/A. The model is also explicitly told never to fabricate content for these sections.

STAGE1_SYSTEM's GAP RULE instructs the model to produce specific, contextual gap placeholders with the format '[Gap: describe specifically what information is missing and why it matters for this product]', including an example referencing measurable targets. The detectGaps function extracts the gap question text from the placeholder and renders it inline below the relevant section. For sparse input with no persona, Section 1 will receive a targeted gap question derived from the placeholder content.

The finalizeBtn handler collects gap answers with their section labels and passes them as Q&A pairs to Stage 2. STAGE2_SYSTEM explicitly instructs placement inline within the relevant section and prohibits appending at the bottom or creating new sections. The userMsg includes the current draft and pairs keyed by section header, enabling correct placement. currentMarkdown is updated with the Stage 2 response before rendering.

STAGE1_SYSTEM instructs the model to begin output with '# AI Product Requirements Document: [Product Name]'. currentMarkdown holds the raw markdown string. copyBtn uses navigator.clipboard.writeText(currentMarkdown) to copy the raw markdown. downloadBtn creates a Blob with currentMarkdown and sets a.download = 'prd-draft.md', ensuring a .md extension. All 7 section header prefixes are required by the system prompt.
